scenes.narration: Bhai, Amazon ke SDE-2 round mein Deadlock: Detect, Prevent, Avoid pe ye trick poochhi jati hai. 30 second sun le.
Without understanding Deadlock: Detect, Prevent, Avoid, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Deadlock: Detect, Prevent, Avoid like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Deadlock: Detect, Prevent, Avoid: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Deadlock: Detect, Prevent, Avoid: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Deadlock: Detect, Prevent, Avoid to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Deadlock: Detect, Prevent, Avoid solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
